channel.title: GovCon Weekly Intelligence
channel.description: Weekly federal contract intelligence — recompetes, competitor tracking, strategic analysis

item.title: GovWin Alternatives: 5 Federal Contract Intelligence Tools for Small Business
item.description: Compare GovWin, Bloomberg Gov, GovTribe, HigherGov, and GovCon Weekly Intelligence. Honest review of federal contract intelligence tools including pricing, strengths, and weaknesses for small businesses.

item.title: Federal Contract Intelligence for 8(a) and SDVOSB Firms on a Budget
item.description: How 8(a) and SDVOSB small businesses can compete for federal contracts without $20K intelligence tools. Practical strategies using free data sources and smart positioning.

item.title: How to Track Federal Contract Recompetes Before They Hit SAM.gov
item.description: Practical guide to tracking federal contract recompetes and expiring contracts using USAspending.gov and FPDS data. Find opportunities before your competitors see the RFP on SAM.gov.

item.title: Top Federal IT Awards This Week: March 18
item.description: Breakdown of the largest federal IT contract awards for the week of March 18, 2026. $8.7B across 1138 awards tracked.

item.title: Newsletter Archive — GovCon Weekly Intelligence
item.description: Browse past issues of GovCon Weekly Intelligence on Buttondown.
